title: A BIO-INSPIRED MULTI-LAYER FILTER SYSTEM USING BIOCHAR ADSORBENTS FOR WATER AND NUTRIENT UPTAKE
description: A factsheet presenting a prototype multi-layer vertical filter system using biochar adsorbents to retain and recover water and nutrients from agricultural runoff. It details the design, setup, technical requirements, monitoring methods, and potential benefits of the system tested in Mistelbach, Austria.
